text.title: Multimodal VUI Design Spec Worked Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the multimodal-vui-design methodology.

example.title: In-car navigation VUI
example.narrative: Voice-first turn-by-turn nav. Voice primary, screen secondary (glanceable), haptic on lane change. WER budget 8% with 1-retry recovery; fallback to screen-only if 2 retries fail. Persona: calm, low-pitch, formal.
example.artifact: vui-spec.md with modality matrix + error recovery + persona spec.
